introSection: Blizzard was a steel indoor roller coaster previously located at Storyland in Cebu City, Cebu, Philippines.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was thought to have been the same roller coaster as Blizzard at Grand Pier in Weston-Super-Mare, Somerset, England, UK, since it is said to be sold somewhere in the Philippines. That ride closed in 1994 however, while this version supposedly opened in November 1993. The rides are thus not linked to each other. It is unknown where the UK ride went in that case.

fullText:
Blizzard was a steel indoor roller coaster previously located at Storyland in Cebu City, Cebu, Philippines.

The coaster was thought to have been the same roller coaster as Blizzard at Grand Pier in Weston-Super-Mare, Somerset, England, UK, since it is said to be sold somewhere in the Philippines. That ride closed in 1994 however, while this version supposedly opened in November 1993. The rides are thus not linked to each other. It is unknown where the UK ride went in that case.
